items.name_en: CHANEL 24a hobo This seasonвқӨпёҸвҖҚрҹ”ҘвқӨпёҸвҖҚрҹ”Ҙ this hobo is a must-have! Extremely lightweight! It fits almost everything you need, including your phone! Compared to previous hobo bags, this one has a fuller shape. The leather is oil-waxed patent leather.вӣ…пёҸвӣ…пёҸ The shoulder strap length is sufficient and it holds up well with heavy autumn/winter clothes! It might look average in photos, but once you touch the real thing and try it on, you'll love it! Black is very stable! The brown coffee color has a particularly retro vibe!

items.name_en: Chanel 24s Hula Hoop is a must-buy black and gold itemрҹҳҺ This one really offers great value, the bag is very light, and the chain is even lighter. The cute bow is truly versatileрҹҳҚрҹҳҚрҹҳҚ The bag capacity is absolutely amazing, can fit an iPhone Pro MaxрҹҘ№рҹҘ№рҹҘ№ I DIY'd a pearl chain + vintage gold buckle to turn it into a dual-use cute bagрҹҳҚрҹҳҚрҹҳҚ Black and gold calfskin is worth a rush...... Looking forward to the same style pink hula hoop and Tangyuan Pearl mini CF, pearlescent pink, the real thing
